text:
3.
.A contractor plans to install two slides for the children to play in a park. For the children
below the age of 5 y
years, she prefers to have a slide whose top is at a height of 1.5 m, and
is inclined at an angle of 30° to the
 ground, whereas for elder children, she wants to have
a steep slide at a height of 3m, and inclined at an angle of 60° to the
ground. What
should be the length of the slide in each
ncase?
